kirundi.ap_physics_2_ray_diagrams_snell_s_law_: AP Physics 2: udushushanyo tw'imirasire, itegeko rya Snell, indorerwamo, lenzi, kwivanga, gutatana, polarisation. Gukora imyitozo bitabaranye + ibibaze.
kirundi.rainbows_mirages_after_images_color_po: Umukororombya · ibishushanyo by'urumuri · amashusho-nyuma · ibara · ikirere cya polarize
kirundi.50_optical_scientists_from_antiquity_t: 50+ abahanga ba optike kuva kera kugeza ubu
kirundi.30_step_by_step_ap_problems: 30+ ibibazo bya AP intambwe ku yindi
kirundi.lasers_vision_color_astronomy_more: Lazeri, kureba, ibara, ubumenyi bw'inyenyeri + ibindi
kirundi.trivia_records_quotes_safety_data_teac: Ibintu bishimishije · amateka · amagambo · umutekano · amakuru · inama zo kwigisha
kirundi.concept_progress_which_questions_you_h: Iterambere ry'igitekerezo + ni ibihe bibazo wamenye
kirundi.snell_s_law_sandbox_predict_tir_disper: Sandbox y'itegeko rya Snell — hanura TIR + gutatana
kirundi.refraction_snell_s_law_total_internal_: 🌊 Kugonda — itegeko rya Snell + kugaragaza kose kw'imbere
kirundi.lenses_converging_diverging_thin_lens_: 🔍 Lenzi — zihuza + zitatanya, ingingo ya lenzi nto
kirundi.angle_exceeds_critical_angle_no_light_: Inguni irenze inguni y'ingenzi. Nta rumuri runyura — byose bigaragazwa inyuma. Urufatiro rwa fibre optique, kubengerana kwa diyama, periskopi za prism.
kirundi.approaching_tir_boundary_refracted_ray: Yegera umupaka wa TIR. Umurasire wagonzwe ukwira hafi y'ubuso; imbaraga zinyura ziragabanuka.
kirundi.light_entering_denser_medium_n_n_refra: Urumuri rwinjira mu kintu gikomeye (n₁ < n₂). Umurasire wagonzwe ugonda WEREKEZA ku murongo usanzwe — urumuri rutinda mu kintu gikomeye.
kirundi.light_entering_less_dense_medium_refra: Urumuri rwinjira mu kintu coroshye. Umurasire wagonzwe ugonda UVA ku murongo usanzwe — urumuri rwihuta mu kintu coroshye.
kirundi.steep_angle_from_normal_much_energy_re: Inguni ihanamye uva ku murongo usanzwe. Ingufu nyinshi zigaragazwa (Fresnel irazamuka), nke zinyura.
kirundi.snell_s_law_inquiry_refraction_tir_dis: 🔬 Ubushakashatsi bw'itegeko rya Snell — Kugonda, TIR, Gutatana
kirundi.set_n_n_incidence_angle_and_wavelength: Shyiraho n₁, n₂, inguni yo kugwa, n'uburebure bw'umuraba. Hanura aho sisitemu ihindukira iva ku kugonda ijya kuri TIR. Nta manota, nta guhishura.
kirundi.your_hypothesis_where_exactly_does_tir: Igitekerezo cyawe (TIR itangirira he neza, kandi kuki diyama ikora TIR ikomeye kuruta ikirahuri?)
kirundi.e_g_diamond_has_critical_angle_24_vs_g: urugero, diyama ifite inguni y'ingenzi ~24° ugereranyije na ~42° y'ikirahuri, bityo inguni iyo ari yo yose ihanamye ikora TIR...
kirundi.why_is_there_no_critical_angle_when_go: Kuki NTA nguni y'ingenzi iba igihe uva ku coroshye ujya ku gikomeye?
kirundi.set_water_air_n_1_33_n_1_00_what_s_the: Shyiraho amazi→umwuka (n₁=1.33 n₂=1.00). Inguni y'ingenzi ni iyihe? Kuki amafi abona isi yo hejuru yegeranye mu nkokora?
kirundi.in_a_rainbow_why_does_red_bend_less_th: Mu mukororombya, kuki umutuku ugonda gake kuruta ubururu? Uhuze na slider y'uburebure bw'umuraba.
kirundi.how_does_a_prism_separate_white_light_: Prism itandukanya gute urumuri rwera niba uburebure bwose bw'umuraba bukurikiza itegeko rimwe rya Snell?
kirundi.i_can_explain_why_this_n_n_combination: Nshobora gusobanura impamvu iri hujwe rya n₁/n₂/θ ritanga iyi miterere yo kugonda.
kirundi.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget y'ubushakashatsi — nta manota, nta guhishura, nta gusuka ibisubizo. Icyitegererezo cyo gutatana ni icyerekana (nka Cauchy yo ku rwego rwa mbere); imikondo nyayo yo gutatana iterwa n'ibikoresho (Sellmeier coefficients).
